user.title: Catalog Conversation Router
user.description: Select local and fallback LLM conversation agents plus routing behavior.

error.agent_required: Local and fallback LLM agent IDs are required.
error.agents_must_differ: Local and LLM agents must be different.
error.invalid_local_agent: The selected local agent is no longer available. Choose another local agent.
error.invalid_llm_agent: The selected LLM agent is no longer available. Choose another LLM agent.
error.no_llm_agents_found: No LLM conversation agents were found. Install or configure one first.

init.description: Update matcher behavior and manual conversation targets.
